text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've brought shame upon myself. I didn't even
make it onto the scoreboard.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's no excuse—it's a case of pure
insufficiency. I really do have a long way to go...
choice_data_list:
I've got no doubt you'll be able to grow
stronger.

I've got no doubt you'll be able to grow
stronger.

Facing so many strong opponents is exciting,
isn't it?

isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
With my mentor placing such faith in me, this is
no time to halt my progress!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll achieve great results in my next race and repay
your kindness!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Competing against formidable opponents will
help me grow stronger. The mere thought has my
heart racing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I shall return to the basics and
redouble my efforts!
